name: Propolis Extract
description: A resinous mixture that bees produce to seal their hive, known for its antibacterial and healing properties.
scientificSummary: Rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, it has documented anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-microbial activities.
mechanismOfAction: Inhibits bacterial growth and supports the skin's natural healing process by providing essential nutrients and protection.

seo.title: Propolis Extract - Natural Healing | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover the bee-powered benefits of Propolis for clear and healthy skin.
